name: vmerge-firstrow-span
description: Table with firstRow conditional (blue). Cell (0,0) has vMerge restart spanning into row 1. Cell (1,0) is vMerge continue.
expected_behavior: Cell (0,0): firstRow blue applies (row_idx=0). Cell (0,1): firstRow blue applies (row_idx=0). Cell (1,0): vMerge continue — row 1 is NOT firstRow, no blue. Cell (2,0): normal row, no shading.
